recalls.Description: TheKiddoSpace has issued a recall for its handwriting practice kits due to the presence of lead in the pens, which exceeds federal safety standards. The recall affects two types of kits: block handwriting kits featuring reusable books with animal-themed covers, and cursive handwriting kits with books focused on letters, words, and sentences. Both kits include various colored pen grips and refills, all marked with the TheKiddoSpace logo.
recalls.Title: TheKiddoSpace Recalls Handwriting Practice Kits Due to Lead Exposure Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to TheKiddoSpace via email at info@thekiddospace.com or visit www.thekiddospacestore.com/pages/product-recalls/handwriting-kit. More information is also available by clicking "Product Safety Recalls" at the bottom of their website.

Images.Caption: Recalled TheKiddoSpace Block Handwriting Practice Kit
Recalled TheKiddoSpace Cursive Handwriting Practice Kit

Retailers.Name: Available online at TheKiddoSpaceStore.com and Amazon.com from February 2024 to February 2025, priced between $25 and $50.

Importers.Name: SN Commerce LLC, dba TheKiddoSpaceStore, of Dover, Delaware

Hazards.Name: Lead exposure from pens in the handwriting kits

Remedies.Name: Free replacement pens and refills provided by TheKiddoSpace

recalls.metaDescription: TheKiddoSpace recalls handwriting kits due to lead exposure risk. Contact them for free replacements and safety information.
